display.purpose: Hero headlines and primary titles only.

label.purpose: Metadata, unit labels, and small navigation.

components.name: Primary Command Button
components.description: The primary interaction unit for all commands.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(40% 0.12 250); color: #fff; padding: 16px 40px; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.3em; border: none; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(35% 0.14 250); transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 20px 40px -10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); }

components.name: Technical Module Card
components.html:
[REF: UNIT-01]

Module Header

Content anchored to the technical blueprint grid.
components.css: .ds-card-technical { background: oklch(97% 0.01 250); border: 1px solid oklch(20% 0.08 250 / 0.12); padding: 32px; border-radius: 0; position: relative; } .ds-card-label { font-family: monospace; font-size: 9px; color: oklch(40% 0.12 250); font-weight: 800; display: block; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 900; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: oklch(20% 0.08 250); margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.6; color: oklch(35% 0.04 250); }

narrative.overview: TANGLAW is a high-performance, technical interface designed to illuminate the complex path to scholarship aid. Rejecting the 'AI slop' of generic templates, it embraces a modular, grid-driven aesthetic that prioritizes structural clarity and technical authority.
keyCharacteristics: Modular Precision: Layouts anchored to a 40px blueprint grid.
High-Contrast Commands: Bold, uppercase typography and deep 'Sea Blue' accents.
Tactile Feedback: Snappy, spring-based motion and responsive shadows.

rules.name: The 10% Accent Rule
rules.body: The primary Sea Blue and Accent Glow are used on ≤10% of any screen. Their presence must signal a command or a critical status.

rules.name: The Tracking-Technical Rule
rules.body: All display and headline typography must apply letter-spacing: -0.02em to enhance the authoritative, tight feel.

rules.name: The Grid-Anchor Rule
rules.body: All surfaces are flat and flush with the grid at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to user state.

dos: Do use sharp, 0px radius corners for all primary containers and buttons.
Do ensure all text passes WCAG AAA contrast requirements.
Do use monospaced metadata labels (e.g., [REF: 01]) to ground UI elements.
donts: Don't use generic 'magic sparkles' for AI features.
Don't allow text to fall below 12px for body content or have low contrast.
Don't use organic, rounded bubbles for navigation or buttons.
